name: Hot
_comment: Loud / saturator master profile for users who want pre-04-28 boot character. Volume 127 (+12 dB max with scale=2), MakeUp 25 (~+12 dB instead of default's +6.6 dB), compressor unchanged from Default. Net loudness lands ~+17 dB above clean unity — close to the old scale=3 / wire-110 default. Pair with Master Drive on the COMP B page if more saturation is wanted. See docs/architecture/gain-staging-vs-octatrack.md § 'Master Volume convention revisit'.
